macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Economy Adds 178,000 Jobs in March, Unemployment Falls to 4.3%
items.summary: The labor market rebounded strongly in March with 178,000 jobs added, nearly three times economist expectations, while the unemployment rate decreased to 4.3%. This marks the first complete month of job growth since the Iran conflict began.

items.title: Average US Mortgage Rates Climb to 6.46%, Highest in Nearly 7 Months
items.summary: Long-term mortgage rates have reached their highest level in nearly seven months, reflecting broader economic pressures amid the Iran conflict and energy price volatility.

items.title: Gas Prices Surge Past $4 Per Gallon Amid Iran War
items.summary: U.S. average gas prices have exceeded $4 per gallon for the first time since 2022, driven by global fuel price increases related to the ongoing Iran conflict.

items.title: Oracle Reportedly Lays Off Thousands as Part of AI Investment Shift
items.summary: Oracle has announced significant workforce reductions as the company redirects resources toward artificial intelligence investments.

items.title: US Jobless Aid Filings Fall to 202,000 Despite Economic Uncertainty
items.summary: Initial jobless claims have declined to 202,000, indicating that layoffs remain low despite ongoing concerns about the Iran conflict's economic impact.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: SIREN Token Surges 217% in 24 Hours Amid High Trading Volume
items.summary: SIREN token recorded a massive 217.44% price increase to $0.49343, with $181.66 million in 24-hour trading volume against a $351.24 million market cap. The surge highlights strong capital inflows and market interest.

items.title: Crypto Liquidations Reach $59.82M with Shorts Leading Losses
items.summary: Total crypto liquidations hit $59.82 million in the past 24 hours, with short positions suffering $38.93 million in losses compared to $20.89 million for longs. Bitcoin and Ethereum saw significantly higher short liquidations, indicating upward price pressure.

items.title: Top Gainers: EVER Surges 82%, RLS 54%, POLYX 25% in 24 Hours
items.summary: Everscale (EVER) led with an 82.07% gain to $0.0067, followed by RLS at 54.41% to $0.0036 with $7.95M volume, and Polymesh (POLYX) at 25.22% with $72.24M volume. These moves suggest protocol updates or partnerships driving interest.

items.title: 14.9M Chainlink (LINK) Tokens Worth $126M Transferred to Binance
items.summary: A massive 14.9 million LINK inflow to Binance on April 3rd raises concerns of potential sell-side pressure, with LINK price lagging at $8.7 showing only 0.5% 24-hour gain. Analysts warn of further downside amid market uncertainty.

items.title: Bitcoin Stabilizes at $67K as Pi Network's PI Token Finds footing
items.summary: Bitcoin price calmed around $67K with minimal movement, while Pi Network's PI token stabilized after volatility. HASH led losers, but VET re-entered gainers in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Ethereum Foundation Approaches 70,000 Staked ETH Milestone
items.summary: The Ethereum Foundation nears its 70,000 ETH staking target, with ETH price holding steady above $2,000 showing no major 24-hour change. This development underscores ongoing network progress.

items.title: BitMine Acquires 40,000 ETH Worth $82M Signaling Institutional Interest
items.summary: BitMine purchased 40,000 ETH valued at $82.07 million, reflecting strong institutional accumulation in Ethereum amid stable prices.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
